imports.primary: import { S3Client, PutObjectCommand, GetObjectCommand, DeleteObjectCommand } from '@aws-sdk/client-s3';

primary_operations.name: putBlob
primary_operations.sdk_call: await this._client.send(new PutObjectCommand({ Bucket: this._bucket, Key: key, Body: body }));

primary_operations.name: getBlob
primary_operations.sdk_call: const r = await this._client.send(new GetObjectCommand({ Bucket: this._bucket, Key: key })); return Buffer.from(await r.Body.transformToByteArray());

primary_operations.name: deleteBlob
primary_operations.sdk_call: await this._client.send(new DeleteObjectCommand({ Bucket: this._bucket, Key: key }));

code_style_notes: S3 SDK v3 is modular; import only commands you use
